title: Analog IC Design Engineer
description:
Job Description:

You will be responsible for the design of innovative, high-performance, and reliable high-speed analog ICs for SerDes applications. These products aim to enable the next-generation of data communication systems using high speed wireline transmission, empowering the ever growing digital revolution. You will work within a group of design experts interfacing with layout, overseas design teams to create detailed specifications, innovative designs to meet the technological requirements.

Key responsiblities:

  • Planning and designing of high speed analog IC for Serdes application based on design requirements
  • Perform circuit simulation and optimization to meet specification
  • Prepare and discuss circuit, results of design in design reviews
  • Conduct IC verification and debugging to ensure silicon perform according to design.
  • Work with layout engineer for device level design to realize best circuit response
  • Work with application engineers to support customer application issues

Requirements:

  • Minimum Bachelor's degree in Electrical/Electronics engineering or equivalent.
  • Possess experience working in IC design environment
  • Good knowledge in CMOS analog circuit design/processes
  • Good knowledge in High-Speed Interfaces design and be willing to take on the challenge of creating cutting-edge new technology by anticipating market trends and product evolution.
  • Posess good knowledge in analyzing and designing High-Speed Interface PHY, ADC, PLL, Clock and data recovery (CDR), Equalization and signal integrity optimization, Ampllfiers, reference voltages etc.
  • Experience in developing IC and proficient in design tools usage (Cadence/Synopsys, Custom Compiler/Fine Sim)
  • Good communication skills and ability to work in a team

postedCompany.description:
Nuvoton Technology Corporation (NTC) was founded to bring innovative semiconductor solutions to the market. NTC was spun-off as a Winbond Electronics affiliate in July 2008 and went public in September 2010 on the Taiwan Stock Exchange (TSE). Nuvoton Technology focuses on the developments of microcontroller, microprocessor, smart home and cloud security IC and has strong market share in Industrial, Consumer and Computer markets. Nuvoton owns a wafer fab, featuring customized processes for analog and power products. Besides in-house IC products, the wafer fab also provides part of its capacity for foundry services. Nuvoton Technology provides products with a high performance/cost ratio for its customers by leveraging flexible technology, advanced design capability, and integration of digital and analog technologies. Nuvoton values long term relationships with its partners and customers and is dedicated to continuous innovation of its products, processes, and services. The company has established subsidiaries in the USA, China, Israel, India, Singapore, Korea and Japan to strengthen regional customer support and global management.


On 1st September 2020, Nuvoton Technology Singapore Pte Ltd (NTSG) was established in Singapore. Our Product Applications are - Automotive electric vehicle, Electric bikes, Energy storage system, Servers, 4/8K display, AR/VR headset, Inverter aircon/fridge/washing machine,  Automotive cluster/HUD/Electric mirror, Robot/Industrial machine vision, Automotive image sensing, etc

NTSG activities aim to expand NTC group business to worldwide in the Battery Application, Spatial Sensing, Edge AI and Asian Outsource Assembly & Test commissioned control.
postedCompany.name: NUVOTON TECHNOLOGY SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D16 Upper East Coast, Bedok, Eastwood, Kew Drive
